mapper.select: SELECT role_key AS roleKey, role_name AS roleName, use_yn AS useYn FROM roles ORDER BY role_key LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT role_key AS roleKey, role_name AS roleName, use_yn AS useYn FROM roles ORDER BY role_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO roles(role_key, role_name, use_yn) VALUES(#{roleKey}, #{roleName}, #{useYn})
